title: Bitdeer July 2024 Production and Operations Update
text: Bitdeer announced July 2024 production and operations metrics. The company demonstrated continued mining growth despite challenging market conditions following the April 2024 Bitcoin halving. Infrastructure development proceeded across multiple continents as Bitdeer executed its global expansion strategy. The July 2024 update provided visibility into the company's progress toward achieving operational scale and cost efficiency targets. Key focus areas included SEALMINER hardware deployment for self-mining and external customer sales, power infrastructure development, and geographic diversification. The company pursued simultaneous initiatives across Bitcoin mining expansion, hardware manufacturing, and early-stage AI infrastructure exploration. Bitdeer's July 2024 operations reflected the company navigating the transition period following the Bitcoin halving, with the company maintaining execution discipline on capital expenditure and infrastructure development.
